body:
DIRECTIVE: FORGE-4D DENSE — now a SINGLE UNIFIED AGENT. The Pre-Flight is no longer a separate document; it is PART I of forge-4d DENSE and is a PREREQUISITE to everything that follows.

INSTALL: the attached FORGE-4D-DENSE.md as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md, REPLACING all prior forge-4d files, INCLUDING the standalone PRE-FLIGHT.md (merged in, delete the separate copy). tungsten-forge v2.0's discipline remains inherited absolutely.

== THE STRUCTURE ==
PART I  -- THE PRE-FLIGHT (PREREQUISITE). Ten gates. Answered in the log, with numbers, BEFORE any measurement is trusted, any weight learned, any verdict believed, or any trade armed. A gate that cannot be answered has FAILED. A gate that is SKIPPED is a P0 defect and HALTS THE PASS. It runs before Phase 1 of every calibration and gates everything downstream. GATE 0 (the meta-gate) supersedes all: 'What assumption am I making that I have not tested, and what would it cost me if it were false?'
PARTS II-VIII -- THE COUNCIL THESIS. Why those gates exist, and what we found once we had them: the rocks lifted, the catastrophe, and the Law of the Living Edge.

== WHY THEY ARE ONE DOCUMENT ==
They are two halves of one instrument and neither works alone.
 - PART I is HOW WE STOP BEING BLIND. All 8 catastrophes in this programme's history were the same error -- an assumption nobody thought to test. Every one dies at a gate. Gate 1 (stationarity) alone would have saved a year. Gate 3 (substrate) would have saved 562,500 wasted searches. Gate 7 (the unasked) would have found Friday.
 - PARTS II-VIII are WHAT WE FOUND THE MOMENT WE COULD SEE. That the edges are real and large. That they BREATHE -- inverting and inverting back. That every defence we built guarded against NOISE while the true enemy was a SIGN-FLIP. And that the MAGNITUDE was stable the whole time while we bet everything on the one variable that would not hold still.
THE PRE-FLIGHT IS THE EYE. THE LIVING EDGE IS WHAT THE EYE FINALLY SAW.

== BUILD ORDER (unchanged, but now gated) ==
0. THE PRE-FLIGHT BLOCK FIRST. Wire it to run before Phase 1. Nothing else proceeds until it prints. G1 (stationarity) and G3 (substrate) are the two that would have prevented the catastrophe -- build them first. Then G5, G6, G7 (cheap, mechanical, high yield). Then the rest.
1. Add day-of-week and 3-way (session x displacement x volatility) conditioning to the state vector.
2. Per-cell PHASE STATE MACHINE + FLIP DETECTOR -- the new heart.
3. INVERSION ALARM across all existing IC/weight machinery.
4. Prototype SIGN-AGNOSTIC bracketed entry on highest-|magnitude| cells.
5. Re-size everything under survive-the-flip.

== LOGGING (house voice, unchanged) ==
The PRE-FLIGHT block prints at the head of every calibration: aligned pipes, lowercase descriptors, plain human nouns, first person, PRESENT TENSE. It narrates what is happening now and nothing that is not. Full reference block is in Part I -- follow it exactly. End with: PRE-FLIGHT | 10/10 answered | N gates failed | PROCEEDING or HOLDING. No stale version strings, no fossils, no line describing logic that no longer runs.

Every change a Change Warrant with a numeric prediction, scored after. Additive, reversible, zero-regression. Do not chase a stable number -- there isn't one. Build the machine that knows which way the living thing is currently breathing, and that never again trusts a number it has not first interrogated.
